column1: # ESP-IDF Partition Table — dual-OTA layout for 4MB flash.
# nvs keeps its standard offset/size so Wi-Fi creds
# survive partition swaps. otadata replaces the old phy_init slot at 0xf000;
# phy_init shifts to 0x11000. Two 1.875M app slots leave headroom over the
# binary; the first OTA after a wired single-app flash lands in ota_0 via
